rootCause: Task lacked an explicit output_schema contract despite stable competency_scores columns.
fixApplied: Added minimal output_schema requiring competency_tag and avg_score.
method: Registry metadata contract based on actual API columns.
beforeBehavior: API returned chartable columns but registry did not declare required output columns.
afterBehavior: Registry declares minimal output contract for competency chart fields.
notes: Targeted API returned HTTP 200 success=true with required columns present.

rootCause: Task lacked output_schema and has two dataset blocks; absence context is separate from score_series chart fields.
fixApplied: Added output_schema requiring only assessment_order and score_normalized; absence fields are optional.
method: Registry metadata contract based on actual API columns and primary chart dataset.
beforeBehavior: API returned score_series plus absence_data but registry did not declare output columns.
afterBehavior: Registry requires primary score_series chart fields without requiring separate absence_data fields.
notes: Per user adjustment, absences and absence_rate are optional; targeted API passed.
